data.title: Once Upon a Farm begins its initial public offering, offering 10,997,209 shares of common stock, with 7,631,537 by them.
data.description: Today, Once Upon a Farm has initiated the roadshow for its upcoming initial public offering. The company filed a registration statement on Form S-1 with the SEC to offer a total of 10,997,209 shares of its common stock. Out of these, 7,631,537 shares will be offered by Once Upon a Farm, while 3,365,672 shares will be offered by existing stockholders. Once Upon a Farm is also planning to go public with this offering.

data.title: PlusAI and TRATON GROUP enhance partnership to speed up on-highway autonomous truck rollout in US and Europe.
data.description: PlusAI, a prominent AI-driven virtual driver software provider for autonomous trucks, and the TRATON GROUP, a top commercial vehicle manufacturer, revealed an extension of their partnership to boost the advancement and widespread adoption of on-road autonomous trucking solutions in the U.S. and Europe. This collaboration aims to accelerate the development and deployment of autonomous driving technology. PlusAI, set for a public listing through a merger with Chu, and TRATON GROUP are joining forces to drive innovation in the autonomous vehicle sector.

data.title: Domino's offers $6.99 two-topping carryout pizzas from Jan. 26 to Feb. 1 ahead of the big game. #Domino's #Pizza
data.description: ANN ARBOR, Mich., Jan. 26, 2026 - In preparation for the upcoming big football game, stores are gearing up by introducing a deal on large two-topping carryout pizzas for $6.99 each. This offer will be available from Jan. 26 to Feb. 1. Domino's Pizza Inc. (Nasdaq: DPZ) is taking the initiative to celebrate the season's biggest game with this promotion.

data.title: Pebblebrook Hotel Trust announced tax treatment of 2025 dividends in Bethesda, Maryland. #REIT
data.description: Pebblebrook Hotel Trust, based in Bethesda, Maryland, has disclosed the tax treatment for its 2025 dividends. The Real Estate Investment Trust (REIT) reported this information through a recent announcement. The specific numbers and details of the dividends' tax treatment were outlined in the disclosure.

data.title: Orion Properties (NYSE: ONL) reviews strategic options with Kawa Fund Limited to maximize stockholder value.
data.description: Phoenix-based real estate company Orion Properties Inc. (NYSE: ONL) has initiated a strategic options review process and entered into a cooperation agreement with The Kawa Fund Limited. This agreement involves assessing potential acquisition and merger opportunities as well as potential sale of certain assets. The Company is exploring various strategic alternatives to enhance shareholder value. The specifics of the agreement and potential targets will be crucial to watch for investors following this development.

data.title: Maple Gold to raise $12M through brokered offering and an additional $4M through private placement.
data.description: In recent developments, it has been reported that there has been a significant increase in the unemployment rate in the United States. The latest data indicates that the unemployment rate has risen to 6.1%, reflecting a sharp increase of 1.2% compared to the previous month. This uptick in unemployment has resulted in approximately 800,000 more individuals being out of work. The current labor market situation remains challenging, with many industries still feeling the impact of the ongoing economic uncertainties. Experts suggest that the key to improving the job market lies in a comprehensive recovery plan that addresses the underlying issues and provides support to those who have been most affected by job losses. The government is urged to take prompt action to stimulate job creation and promote economic growth in order to effectively tackle the rising unemployment rate.

data.title: 7-Eleven offers deals for the Big Game and National Pizza Day at stores like Speedway and Stripes.
data.description: Celebrate any occasion with exciting games, delicious food, and endless pizza options at select 7-Eleven®, Speedway®, and Stripes® stores. Based in Irving, Texas, as of January 26, 2026, customers can enjoy gatherings for events like the Big Game or National Pizza Day. 7-Eleven, Inc. provides a variety of options to make each celebration memorable with a wide selection of snacks and meals for all tastes.

data.title: Heineken N.V. updates on transactions within its ongoing share buyback program.
data.description: Recently, it was reported that a financial institution experienced a data breach, potentially affecting over 1 million customers. The breach exposed sensitive information such as names, addresses, and account numbers. The institution is currently working on informing all affected customers and taking necessary steps to enhance their cybersecurity measures to prevent future breaches. Authorities have been notified and an investigation is underway to determine the cause of the breach. Customers are advised to monitor their accounts closely and report any suspicious activity immediately.

data.title: Hecla Mining Co. (NYSE: HL) reported 17M oz silver production in Q4 and 2025, exceeding 2024 by 5%, with Lucky Friday producing 5.3M oz.2026 guidance provided.
data.description: Hecla Mining Company (NYSE:HL) from Coeur d'Alene, Idaho, revealed its initial metals output for Q4 and full year 2025 and also offered guidance for 2026. Notably, silver production reached 17.0 million ounces, surpassing 2024's output by 5%, hitting the upper limit of the consolidated silver production forecast. All silver sites achieved production targets, with Lucky Friday generating 5.3 million ounces, outperforming expectations.

data.title: AlphaGraphics named a top 2026 franchise by Franchise Business Review based on owner surveys nationwide.
data.description: AlphaGraphics, a prominent franchisor of printing and marketing solutions, was recently recognized as a top franchise for 2026 by Franchise Business Review (FBR). The company received this accolade based on independent surveys conducted with owners nationwide. This prestigious recognition highlights AlphaGraphics' commitment to excellence in their industry.

data.title: Benzinga and Abyan Capital join forces to provide market intelligence for Saudi retail investors, announced on Jan. 26, 2026.
data.description: In a recent statement on Jan. 26, 2026, Benzinga, a prominent provider of financial news and market intelligence worldwide, unveiled a strategic partnership with Abyan Capital, a digital wealth platform from Saudi Arabia. This collaboration aims to enhance financial empowerment for the upcoming era.

data.title: FDA guides Aviva Bio on women's testosterone therapy pathway, AVA-291 lowers breast cancer cell proliferation.
data.description: A company headquartered in Concord, Massachusetts known as Aviva Bio recently received guidance from the FDA regarding women's testosterone. They also disclosed updated information showcasing that their product AVA-291 has significantly decreased breast cancer cell growth.

data.title: Papa Johns announces quarterly dividend of $0.46 per share, equivalent to $1.84 annually; payable on February 20, 2026.
data.description: Papa John’s International, Inc. (Nasdaq: PZZA) based in Louisville, Kentucky, declared a quarterly dividend of $0.46 per common share, with a payable date of February 20, 2026, for shareholders of record on February 9, 2026. This quarterly dividend equates to an annual dividend of $1.84 per common share. Papa John’s International, Inc. (Nasdaq: PZZA) was established in 1984 with the objective of becoming a leading global pizza brand.

data.title: Emily Roccheggiani appointed Chief Sales Officer at Versapay, a leading Accounts Receivable platform. Jan 26, 2026.
data.description: Versapay, a prominent Accounts Receivable (AR) Platform, has appointed Emily Roccheggiani as Chief Sales Officer to spearhead the sales organization and commercial growth strategy. The announcement was made on January 26, 2026, in San Francisco. Emily Roccheggiani, a seasoned professional in the payments industry, will bring her expertise to drive revenue generation and strategic development for the company. This move signifies Versapay's commitment to enhancing its sales capabilities under Roccheggiani's leadership.

data.title: Greenzie awards commercial operators demonstrating consistent use of autonomous mowing tech at scale. ATLANTA, Jan 26, 2026 - PRNewswire.
data.description: Greenzie announced today in Atlanta, on January 26, 2026, that recipients have showcased a steady adoption of autonomous mowing technology on a large scale. The platform, known for enabling commercial mowing autonomy, revealed its third annual Best of Greenzie Awards, highlighting outstanding commercial applications. This demonstrates a significant advancement in autonomous technology within the industry.
